problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: If Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
